s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT LH HOLE SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the front drive shaft LH hole snap ring.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, remove the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front axle inboard joint boot clamp.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: For one touch type:

s3.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: For claw engagement type:

s3.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, remove the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front axle inboard joint boot clamp.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the No. 2 front axle inboard joint boot clamp.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT

s2.ptxt: Separate the front axle inboard joint boot from the inboard joint assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE INBOARD JOINT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the grease from the inboard joint assembly.
Put matchmarks on the inboard joint assembly and outboard joint shaft.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use a punch for the marks.

s2.ptxt: Remove the inboard joint assembly from the outboard joint shaft.
Using a snap ring expander, remove the shaft snap ring.
Put matchmarks on the outboard joint shaft and tripod joint.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use a punch for the marks.

s2.ptxt: Using a brass bar and a hammer, remove the tripod joint from the outboard joint shaft.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE INBOARD JOINT BOOT

s2.ptxt: Remove the inboard joint boot from the outboard joint shaft.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER LH (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, remove the drive shaft damper clamp as shown in the illustration.
Remove the drive shaft damper.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER RH (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front drive shaft damper RH.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the front drive shaft damper LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER LH (for 2AZ-FE Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: For one touch type:

s3.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the drive shaft damper clamp as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: For claw engagement type:

s3.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, remove the drive shaft damper clamp as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: Remove the drive shaft damper.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DAMPER RH (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front drive shaft damper RH.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the front drive shaft damper LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, remove the No. 2 front axle outboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front axle outboard joint boot clamp.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the No. 2 front axle outboard joint boot clamp.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 2 front axle outboard joint boot clamp as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT CLAMP (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Remove the front axle outboard joint boot clamp.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedures as for the No. 2 front axle outboard joint boot clamp.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT AXLE OUTBOARD JOINT BOOT

s2.ptxt: Remove the outboard joint boot from the outboard joint shaft.
Remove the grease from the outboard joint.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, remove the drive shaft dust cover LH.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop the inboard joint assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER RH

s2.ptxt: Using a press, remove the drive shaft dust cover RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT DUST COVER

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, remove the drive shaft dust cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DRIVE SHAFT BEARING

s2.ptxt: Using a snap ring expander, remove the drive shaft hole snap ring.
Using SST and a press, remove the bearing.
Remove the bearing bracket hole snap ring.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop the inboard joint assembly.
